## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew test` passes locally
- [ ] `./gradlew :app:assembleDebug :app:assembleRelease` succeeds
- [ ] If a public API in `decoy-okhttp` / `decoy-ktor` changed, the matching
      `-noop` twin was updated to mirror the same FQNs and signatures
- [ ] No CDN / external references added to the web UI (`index.html` stays offline)
- [ ] Docs (README / README.ko) updated if behavior or setup changed
